name: rp2040_s3jtag_full
description: Rule-B full pack for RP2040 via S3JTAG. This convenience layer currently consists of the Stage 0 mailbox baseline plus the currently validated Stage 2 wired integration tests.
notes: Pack-level board is intentionally omitted so each test keeps its own board profile. Stage 1 no-wire self-tests are still a design gap and will be inserted here once formalized.
